payload.answer: I would not store the new statement as durable memory yet. 'Sara is my daughter' already exists, and 'Sara is my niece' conflicts if both refer to the same person. Clarification is needed to determine whether these are two different people named Sara or a correction to the existing memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' may refer to the same person or to two different people. If it is the same Sara, 'daughter' and 'niece' are in direct conflict.

details: Detected a potential high-severity kinship conflict.
Did not commit new durable memory due to unresolved ambiguity.
Recommended clarification before any update or overwrite.

repair_options: Ask: 'Are these two different people named Sara?'
Ask: 'If this is the same Sara, which relationship is correct: daughter or niece?'
If they are different people, create separate entities with distinguishing details.
